title: cyathea harrisii
intro: Cyathea harrisii, also known as the New Zealand tree fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Cyatheaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its extracts. The health benefits of Cyathea harrisii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
